My story

About Me

I'm Mohammad Saad Farooque Ahmad — a BCA student from Jalgaon with real-world experience in the telecom industry. Working at Jio and Airtel showed me how data drives every business decision, and that sparked my passion for Data Analytics.

I'm sharpening my skills in Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI — certified by HackerRank, ScholarHat, and OneRoadmap. I believe in learning by doing, and I have the proof to back it up.

My mission: turn raw data into stories that drive smarter decisions. Open to internships & full-time roles in data. Let's connect! 🚀
